title: Guy Imitates Michael Jackson in Front of Him
description:

Michael watches the impression and suddenly bursts out laughing, clearly amused by the performance. The genuine reaction from the King of Pop himself made this one of the funniest and most wholesome MJ clips ever captured.This video is presented for educational and historical purposes only.
